headline: Global Payments (GPN) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Global Payments (GPN) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: BMO Coverage Highlights Global Payments Reset After Worldpay Deal And Divestitures
summary: BMO Capital initiated coverage on Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) following a major business transformation. The move comes after Global Payments completed significant divestitures and advanced integration of Worldpay. Coverage focuses on the company’s repositioning as a merchant acquiring and commerce enablement platform. For investors looking at payments, Global Payments sits at the intersection of card processing, merchant acquiring and software-driven commerce tools. The company’s recent...

headline: What's Behind GPN's Q1 Expectations: Will Cost Trends Worry Investors?
summary: Global Payments heads into Q1 with big revenue growth forecasts after Worldpay, but rising operating costs could pressure margins.
